## Summary
- What changed (high-level, 3-7 bullets)

## Problem
- What user/developer problem this PR solves

## Scope
- In scope
- Out of scope

## Design / Approach
- Key decisions and why
- Alternatives considered (brief)

## Files Changed
- `path/to/file`: what changed and why

## Behavior Changes
- Before:
- After:

## Tests
- UI/Navigation changed? (`Yes/No`)
- Pre-PR/PUSH local UI verification done? (`Yes/No`)
- Automated:
  - `./gradlew ...`
- androidTest compile:
  - `./gradlew :app:compileDebugAndroidTestKotlin`
- connected androidTest:
  - `./gradlew :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest`
- Manual:
  - Scenario and result

## Coverage Impact
- Affected non-UI layers and expected coverage impact
- If no coverage change, explain why

## Risks / Rollback
- Potential risks
- Rollback plan

## Migration / Release Notes
- Migration needed? (`Yes/No`)
- Release note summary (user-facing)
